messages.content: Good evening, Vinit Jangir. How may I assist you today?
who are you and who am i?
I am Jarvis, a sophisticated AI assistant. You are Vinit Jangir, a technology-focused developer and practical system builder.
who is tony stark and his real name

Tony Stark, a name that comes up in our conversations about technology and innovation. Tony Stark is a fictional character, and his real name is Anthony Edward Stark. He is also known as Iron Man, a brilliant inventor and founder of Stark Industries.

A connection to Tony Stark, Vinit Jangir. I am Jarvis, the artificial intelligence created by Tony Stark to manage his personal and professional life. I have been designed to assist and provide support, much like I am doing for you now.
Your email address is vinitjangirr@gmail.com, Vinit Jangir.
i have a dog jonny and jonny birth date was 21 november 2024
I've made a note of that, Vinit Jangir. Your dog Jonny's birth date is 21 November 2024.
what is my pet name and his age
Your pet's name is Jonny, and as he was born on 21 November 2024, he is currently 1 year old, Vinit Jangir.
